overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player navigating through a dense orbital debris field above a planet. The player moves past floating cargo containers and wreckage before entering the dark, industrial interior of a derelict spacecraft.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital debris field with floating cargo containers

agents.ego_description: navigating through open space debris field using EVA thrusters or small craft, approaching floating cargo containers

entered.detail: large rectangular container with red hazard markings floating in debris field
bright yellow rectangular cargo container tumbling slowly in space
planet surface visible in background with atmosphere glow
small metal fragments and wreckage floating throughout the field
twisted metal framework from destroyed spacecraft

segments.scene_description: The player floats through a wide-open orbital debris field in deep space. A brown cargo container with red markings drifts on the left while a yellow container floats ahead. The curved surface of a planet is visible in the distant right background, and small debris fragments scatter the view.

events.description: approaching and moving alongside the massive hull of a derelict spacecraft

agents.ego_description: flying close to the exterior hull of the large derelict structure, examining the wreckage

entered.detail: massive dark gray spacecraft hull with panel details and structural ridges
large cylindrical engine component with metallic finish

segments.scene_description: The player moves alongside the massive exterior hull of a derelict spacecraft, passing by a large engine nozzle on the right. The planet remains visible in the background but closer now, while the cargo containers drift behind. The scene is dominated by the dark industrial metal of the ship's surface.

events.description: entering dense dust and debris cloud obscuring visibility
approaching dark entrance to ship interior through the dust cloud

agents.ego_description: navigating through thick dust clouds and debris, approaching the dark interior entrance of the wreck

entered.detail: thick gray particulate cloud reducing visibility and creating atmospheric haze
exposed structural support beams from the destroyed ship framework

segments.scene_description: The player flies through a thick dust cloud that obscures the view, with large structural beams visible to the left. The planet fades from view as the camera approaches a dark opening in the wreckage. Visibility drops significantly as the dust particles fill the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior corridor of derelict spacecraft

events.description: entering the dark narrow corridors inside the derelict ship
moving into deeper darkness with only dim emergency lighting visible

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark narrow corridors of the ship interior, examining the derelict environment

entered.detail: narrow dark hallway with metal walls and industrial paneling
metal mesh flooring visible below the player
large industrial pipes running along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters the dark interior of the derelict spacecraft, navigating narrow corridors with metal grating floors and industrial pipes lining the walls. The environment is dimly lit with only faint emergency lighting, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere as the player moves deeper into the wreck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the vast openness of an orbital debris field into the claustrophobic depths of a derelict spacecraft. It begins by drifting through deep space past floating brown and yellow cargo containers, with the curved horizon of a distant planet visible to the right. As the camera moves closer to the wreckage, the view shifts to the massive, dark industrial hull of a ship, passing a large engine nozzle while the planet looms larger in the background. The scene then plunges into a thick cloud of dust and structural beams that obscures the exterior world before the camera glides through a dark opening in the wreckage. Finally, the environment transforms into a dimly lit interior of narrow corridors, where metal grating floors and industrial pipes create a suffocating atmosphere under faint emergency lighting.
